revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:赤湯温泉]]
'''Akayu Onsen''' (赤湯温泉) ;Current Names * {{ill|Akayu Onsen (Yamagata)|ja|赤湯温泉 (山形県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akayu Onsen (Yamagata)|1=Akayu Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17238816}} - A {{ill|Onsen|en|Onsen|qid=Q655311|lt=Onsen|1=Onsen}} in {{ill|Nan'yō, Yamagata|en|Nan'yō, Yamagata|qid=Q850496|lt=Nanyō, Yamagata|1=Nan'yō, Yamagata}}, {{ill|Yamagata Prefecture|en|Yamagata Prefecture|qid=Q125863|lt=Yamagata Prefecture|1=Yamagata Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Akayu Onsen (Fukushima)|ja|赤湯温泉 (福島県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akayu Onsen (Fukushima)|1=Akayu Onsen (Fukushima)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635794}} - A hot spring in {{ill|Fukushima (city)|en|Fukushima (city)|qid=Q161176|lt=Fukushima, Fukushima|1=Fukushima (city)}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|en|Fukushima Prefecture|qid=Q71707|lt=Fukushima Prefecture|1=Fukushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Akayu Onsen (Niigata)|ja|赤湯温泉 (新潟県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akayu Onsen (Niigata)|qq=}} - A hot spring in {{ill|Yuzawa, Niigata|en|Yuzawa, Niigata|qid=Q1204269|lt=Yuzawa, Niigata|1=Yuzawa, Niigata}}, {{ill|Minami-Uonuma District, Niigata|en|Minami-Uonuma District, Niigata|qid=Q798772|lt=Minamiuonuma District, Niigata|1=Minami-Uonuma District, Niigata}}, {{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|qid=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture|1=Niigata Prefecture}}. ;Former Name * {{ill|Higashi-Naruko Onsen|lt=Higashi-Naruko Onsen|lt=Akayu Onsen (Miyagi)|ja|赤湯温泉 (宮城県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akayu Onsen (Miyagi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東鳴子温泉}} - A former name for {{ill|Higashi-Naruko Onsen|ja|東鳴子温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashi-Naruko Onsen|qq=}} in {{ill|Ōsaki, Miyagi|en|Ōsaki, Miyagi|qid=Q385892|lt=Ōsaki, Miyagi|1=Ōsaki, Miyagi}}, {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|en|Miyagi Prefecture|qid=Q47896|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}, derived from the abbreviation of "Akabai no Yu" (赤梅の湯).
{{disambiguation}}
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|赤湯温泉|version=78219517|comment=Imported full ja history}}
